title: Server Resource Pack Ignorer
description: Adds a button in the Confirm Server Textures screen to allow you to reject server textures from downloading without being disconnected.
body:
A Mod that adds an 'Ignore & Continue' button to the Confirm Server Resource Pack screen which enables you to continue playing without the resource pack being downloaded, even if it is required by the server. Tested on wynncraft, stray.gg & cubecraft.net ![The new confirm server textures screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d9027b533ec2e0892436c9a0e211840c531c9673_0.webp) ## Settings Type ```/serverresourcepackignorer``` to open the setting GUI Stop Client Disconnect, when enabled, stops you from being kicked by your client when you press the Disconnect button in the Confirm Resources screen. Some servers will then forcefully disconnect you anyway. Always Show Prompt, when enabled, opens the Confirm Resources screen regardless of whether you have set the servers resource packs to enabled, prompt or disabled. The Config file is saved at ```/serverresourcepackignorer.config``` ## Changelog 25/10/25 Fixed mod not working as intended
31/01/26 Added 2 new settings, added setting menu, added config, added translations
08/02/26 Added title to setting menu, added config button to confirm screen ## Translations Translations are available for en_gb, en_us, lol_us and fr_fr
